violations.text: The hand-washing sink near the 3 bay sink was lacking paper towels. PIC replaced roll. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink near the 3 bay sink. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. PIC replaced soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2025

Coffee filter holster was observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. PIC removed item. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2025

The hand-washing sink near the 3 bay sink was blocked by crates, dolly, and other items. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. PIC cleared a path to sink. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2025

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2025

The doors to the outside, located in the front AND back of store, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025

Beverages were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler and back storage area. Food (including beverages) must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2024

Mini fridge next to coffee station was observed with an ambient temperature of 55 degrees F. Establishment not to use unit for TCS items until unit can hold TCS items at or below 41 degrees F. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, ice, and/or other debris: - walk-in cooler shelves, - walk-in cooler fan, - ice cream deep freezer, - mini cooler (inside and vent) New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2025

The floors throughout the facility (especially behind equipment, under retail shelves, and walk-in cooler) have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2025
Bottled beverages were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler and sales floor. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2024

The floors under shelving and 3 bay sink in the back storage room have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed by the exterior back door. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/09/2023
